title: tanacetum kittaryanum subsp. kittaryanum
intro: Tanacetum kittaryanum subsp. kittaryanum, commonly known as Armenian tansy, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Caucasus region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Armenian tansy include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Armenian tansy can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin for its therapeutic benefits.
